channel.title: RPG Design on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in RPG Design on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Would You Play A Game That...?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to ask you a question: Would you play a game?

item.title: Mini Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about mini games.

item.title: Restricting Content Based On Player Choice
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about restricting content based on player choice.

item.title: Try Roleplaying
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about trying role playing.

item.title: Escort Quests
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about escort quests.

item.title: Arcanum Magick Design
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Arcanum magic design.

item.title: RPG Features Nobody Asked For
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about RPG features nobody asked for This is kind of a video for my fellow RPG game developers, because I keep seeing these features in RPGs and I don’t think anybody wants them and I don’t know what’s going on.

item.title: Respec
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Funky Town, directions 2 and subloations within.

item.title: Single vs. Multiplayer RPG Designs
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about getting jiggy with it or, more specifically, the application of jiggy oriented procedures to a variety of activities In particular.

item.title: Attributes Limiting Skills
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about attributes, limiting skills or, more specifically, what a.

item.title: Topic vs. Branched Based Dialogs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about topic versus branchb-based dialogue in RPGs.

item.title: The Premade Character
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the pre-made character.

item.title: RPG Myths
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about RPG myths, and what do I mean by that?

item.title: Pros And Cons Of Long RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the pros and cons of long RPGs.

item.title: First vs. Third Person
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about first versus third person.

item.title: The Ultimate RPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the ultimate RPG.

item.title: Deckbuilder RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about deck builder RPGs.

item.title: The Million XP Dungeon
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the million experience Point dungeon, or, based on how I’m dressed, this could also be called The Old Man and the C++- C++.

item.title: Violence As The Default In AAA RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about violence as the as the default in AAA RPGs.

item.title: Solo vs. Party
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Solo versus party character control.

item.title: Worst RPG Ever
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the worst RPG ever.

item.title: Perk Ideas
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about perk ideas.

item.title: Pros And Cons Of GURPS As A CRPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the pros and cons of gerps as a computer role playing game, specifically what I learned trying to implement gerps as a computer game for Fallout.

item.title: IP Idea: Unknown Powers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about an IP idea that I had for unknown Powers.

item.title: Conflating Player Skill With Character Skill
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about conflating player skill with player character skill.

item.title: Ideas For A Generic Fantasy RPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about some ideas for a generic fantasy RPG.

item.title: Troika's Conan The Barbarian Proposal
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about another game proposal I made.

item.title: This Is How You Roleplay
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about a channel I discovered that really showed me

item.title: Replaying Diablo
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about replaying Diablo.

item.title: What Is An RPG?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about what is an RPG?

item.title: Bored Now...
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. I get asked to review games or comment on other games a lot and I’ve said I’m not going to do that. But today I thought I’d do something a little silly, and I mean this light-heartedly. But I’m going to talk about times I’ve been playing games, other RPGs — where I get bored. Bo I’m going to talk about — I’m not going to about particular games.

item.title: Bugs In RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about bugs and particularly bugs and RPGs.

item.title: Morality Systems
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about morality systems in RPGs.

item.title: Making Good Factions
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about making good factions for your games.

item.title: Gameplay's Influence On Story
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about game plays: influence on story.

item.title: Top Five Modern RPG Masterclass
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about my top five modern RPG master class before I start.

item.title: Skill Design in RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about skill design in RPGs in particular.

item.title: A Christmas Lesson In CRPG Design
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me Tim.

item.title: Loot Tables
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about loot tables, or my theory of loot tables, and I’ll talk about what a loot table is, and then I’m going to talk about my theory and the literally hardcore design elements that go into deciding what items go on to loot tables.

item.title: The Evolution Of Flaws
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about the evolution of flaws.

item.title: Tabletop RPG Influences
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about tabletop RPG influences that directly show up in my own computer games.

item.title: Lord Of Light CRPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to answer another question, this one from aramel whisperwind, who asks.

item.title: Class-based vs. Skill-based RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about class versus skill based role-playing games.

item.title: Elden Ring and EverQuest
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about Elden ring and EverQuest, and you may be going.

item.title: What I Like In An RPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about what I like in an RPG, and what I mean by that is: what elements do I like to see in RPGs that I play, which are, unsurprisingly, elements and RPGs that I made?

item.title: Troika's Baldur's Gate 3 Proposal
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about troika’s botters Gate 3 proposal.

item.title: Attribute Design
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about attributes in role-playing games in general, because the last couple days
